topic_coverage.quoted_user_text: Holistic planning UX beyond BUG-0011 AD/AE/AF: first-visit onboarding, empty-plan polish, Compare contextual empty-state, PVA guided UX, template discoverability, visible error surfaces—operator completes scenario workflow without confusion.
React PlanningPage.tsx (Scenarios, Compare, PlanVsActual tabs); plans API (minor copy/contract only—DEC-0073/0074 frozen); docs/user-guides/US-0004.md; Grafana Dashboard 3 operator messaging only.
BUG-0011 DONE Q0019—DEC-0073 overlay-only compare and DEC-0074 PVA 200 no_active_plan are frozen; US-0004 baseline unchanged; no auto-activate first plan; Firefly read-only; no host secrets.

Eight epic acceptance rows AC-1–AC-8; BUG-0011 prerequisite checked; cargo test plans_integration; overlay unit tests; PVA tagged response; omniflow /planning OIDC smoke pass-with-prerequisites BACKEND_FRONTEND_DEPLOY.
Operator confirms planning intuitive from first visit; all US-0014 acceptance rows checked; builds on released BUG-0011; user guide US-0014 updated when USER_GUIDE_MODE=1.

decomposition.rationale: Six UX workflow surfaces (onboarding, empty-plan, Compare copy, PVA guidance, templates, errors) share PlanningPage but BUG-0011 released functional gates; retain US-0014 epic identity; recommend 3 vertical slices at sprint-plan.

recommended_slices.title: First-run onboarding + template discoverability
recommended_slices.boundary: Empty state template grid, Create empty plan CTA, template cards, Set-active banner

recommended_slices.title: Compare + PVA contextual UX
recommended_slices.boundary: Compare help copy overlay-only delta; PVA guided card polish; user guide

alternatives_considered: Split into US-0017..0019 backlog stories now — rejected (operator epic continuity from BUG-0011 deferral; sprint-plan owns slice IDs)
Merge into BUG-0011 — rejected (BUG-0011 DONE; epic is polish beyond defect gates)
